title: Thiruvananthapuram、Kerala — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Thiruvananthapuram、Kerala的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Thiruvananthapuram是Kerala的一个城市，人口约1,680,000。The capital of Kerala, a coastal city known for its beaches, backwaters, ancient temples, and space research center at VSSC.
